hero.lightModeMessage: Try dark mode for a more immersive experience ✨
hero.description: I turn ideas into reality with modern technology. Using AI and fullstack development to create functional and beautiful solutions.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: AI Engineer & Fullstack Developer
about.paragraph1: With over 1 year of experience in Artificial Intelligence and fullstack development, I specialize in building scalable applications and intelligent systems using modern technologies. I work across both areas independently and combine them when needed to build innovative solutions.
about.paragraph2: I'm driven by curiosity and a constant desire to improve. I actively explore new technologies and approaches to keep evolving in AI and modern software development.

cards.devDesc: Transforming data and computer vision into fully integrated, end-to-end solutions.
cards.designDesc: Designing simple and intuitive interfaces that make complex systems easy to use.
cards.techDesc: Always adopting modern technologies and best practices to deliver high-quality and future-proof solutions.

projects.title: Featured
projects.description: Here are some of my recent projects. Each project was carefully crafted with attention to detail, performance, and user experience.

sfa.description: System that captures and recognizes car license plates using YOLO and OCR, queries the database, and generates a PDF document with the owner's information.

tanalista.description: App that manages all event organization and features, including Date, Guests, Place, and allows guest entry via QR Code, biometrics, or only ID, with real-time validation and secure report generation.

landingPage.description: Landing page developed to present the services of Gomes Araujo in a clear and modern way. The project focuses on responsive design, good user experience, and a simple and efficient structure for online promotion. Landing pages are designed to present information and encourage visitors to interact with a service or product.

contact.title: Get In
contact.description: Have a project or idea in mind? Feel free to reach out! I’m always open to discussing new opportunities.
